title: 09 top bleachers world plate
prompt: Use case: ads-marketing. REFERENCE AUTHORITY — Image 1 controls Raul and Meg's faces, hair, age, clothing, friendship, and Peelerz product. Do not reproduce its park. Image 2 controls only the high-school football field, descending aluminum bleachers, evening floodlights, and distant-game scale. Remove every orange glow, anime effect, altered player, firework, and supernatural event from Image 2. WORLD GEOGRAPHY — Place Raul and Meg together on the very top row of unusually tall bleachers. They occupy the upper-right third of a wide frame. Several completely empty aluminum rows descend below and around them before reaching the ordinary crowd much farther down; the small live game is visible on the field beyond. Open evening sky fills nearly half the image. No seats or people exist above them. BEAT — A quiet moment before anything changes. They casually share Peelerz, relaxed and familiar, looking intermittently toward the distant game. Natural body language, not posing for camera. CAMERA — cinematic wide establishing shot from slightly below and across their row, 35mm lens, readable faces but environment dominant, soft blue-gold dusk and practical stadium light. AVOID — crowded row around them, park bench, daytime noon, empty stadium, giant teenagers, romance, looking into camera, transformation effects, gummy creatures.

resolved_params.system_prompt: Create one polished cinematic live-action Peelerz commercial styleframe, never a collage or storyboard grid. Preserve the attached teenagers' identities, age, hair, and clothing. Establish a reusable world plate with clear geography and generous negative space. No transformation, anime energy, candy characters, surreal effects, captions, borders, watermarks, or added package copy.
